Technical Sheet: Fusion ForgeSystem RequirementsOS: Linux, macOS, Windows (WSL2 recommended).Disk: 500MB for core toolchains (excluding project dependencies).RAM: 4GB minimum (8GB recommended for mixed C++/Rust builds).DependenciesForge manages most deps internally, but requires host toolchains:rustc / cargo (if building Rust)clang (if building C++)python3 (if building Python)node / bun (if building JS)PerformanceStartup Time: < 50ms.Resolution: < 200ms for graphs with 1000+ nodes.Overhead: Zero-overhead during runtime (Forge is a build-time tool).SecurityLockfiles: Generates Fusion.lock ensuring reproducible builds across all languages.Supply Chain: Supports sigstore verification for downloaded packages.
